claim: Tier 7.7e reproduced the original long-run NARMA10 finite-stream blocker and selected a predeclared repaired NARMA10 generator: same recurrence coefficients with reduced input range U(0,0.2). The selected repair passed all 9 required length/seed cells across 8000/16000/32000 and seeds 42/43/44.
caveat: Benchmark repair/preflight evidence only; not a CRA score, not public usefulness proof, not a baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, and not permission to silently merge repaired U(0,0.2) NARMA results with prior U(0,0.5) NARMA scores.
